selection_policy.default_instruction: When the user asks what to work on, consult rank 1 first and state the assumption before acting.
selection_policy.when_user_asks_whats_next: Summarize the top ranked item plus any active editorial blockers or data-hardening warnings.
selection_policy.when_user_says_go: Proceed with rank 1 unless the user has named a different mode, track, bundle, or priority.

notes: Roadmap remains narrative context; this file is the operational dispatcher.
36 surveillance track(s) are hidden from ordinary rotation until their cooldown expires.

work_items.title: Repair coverage for Chaperone and Heat-Shock Support
work_items.rationale: Run a Chaperone and Heat-Shock Support coverage-repair pass focused on PMID 40663813, current Miplyffa label and drug-interaction context, arimoclomol extension and early-access registries, BGP-15 registry boundaries, passive-heating/HSP boundary records, and recent review or real-world triangulation. Create a public bundle only for staged records that materially improve the evidence map while preserving the current low-confidence, NPC-specific, broad-aging-tentative interpretation.
work_items.default_action: Run a coverage-repair pass against the latest assessment gaps; update public records only if the repair changes public boundaries.

work_items.title: Run field change check for Autophagy Induction
work_items.rationale: Established public baseline exists, so this track should be monitored for meaningful deltas.
work_items.default_action: Run one track-level field change check, record materiality, excluded sources, and a session; create a staged update only for a material public change.

work_items.title: Backfill coverage assessment for Autophagy Induction
work_items.rationale: 21 published baseline track(s) still lack internal coverage assessments; this is the highest-ranked unassessed track in the field-change queue.
work_items.default_action: Review the published outlook, session, staged update, evidence reviews, and public update, then create a coverage assessment without changing public records.
